benefits.description: Taking at night does wonders for sleep

side_effects.description: Skin irritation and mild post-injection pain lasting for hours when using 5/16" 31G needle in belly

protocol_notes: Initial injection: 5/16" 31G needle in belly caused skin irritation. Switched to 1/2" 30G needle, which resolved the issue. Injecting deeper into subcutaneous fat prevents seepage into skin layer. Part of KLOW blend (GHK-Cu mixed with other peptides). Prefers deeper injection with longer needle despite slightly more initial discomfort than 31G.
